qa_pairs.question: How can users be invited to a Globus group?
qa_pairs.answer: Users can be invited to a Globus group by either entering an email address (which is preferred) or searching for their username. Once users have been selected, click the "Add" button to send them an email invitation. They will become visible in the group once they have accepted the invitation.

qa_pairs.question: What are the different membership roles available in a Globus group, and how are they modified?
qa_pairs.answer: In a Globus group, you can assign users roles such as Admin (providing full access), Manager (who can change other user roles), or Member (who has no management functions). To modify a user's role or status, click on their name, make the necessary changes, and then click the "Save Changes" button to commit them.
